Table of Contents

NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The function uses the function to calculate the supplementary group IDs for the user specified in This group list then set up for the current process using The is automatically included in the group list. Typically this value is given as the group number from the password file.

RETURN VALUES

The function returns -1 if it was not invoked by the super-user.

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

The function appeared in

BUGS

The function called by uses the routines based on If the invoking program uses any of these routines, the group structure will be overwritten in the call to
